style_safety_policy: Classical Chinese historical fiction register; formal elevated diction; moral-virtue signaling; divine providence framing; no contemporary colloquialisms; honorific language for hierarchy distinction
pov_and_distance: Omniscient third-person narration maintaining comfortable external distance from any single consciousness; narrator tracks multiple geographic locations and character groups without inhabiting interiority; shifts occur through narrator statement rather than character focalization
sentence_rhythm: Oscillating register: extended explanatory passages (complex sentences with multiple subordinate clauses) alternate with short urgent declaratives (simple subject-verb-object constructions); final paragraphs accelerate into clipped rhythm with fragmented sentences creating breathlessness
paragraphing: Long unbroken stretches of direct dialogue with minimal stage direction or action tags; paragraph breaks reserved as structural signals for major scene transitions or location shifts rather than conversational turns
dialogue_system: Direct quotation predominates; minimal reliance on attribution tags ('said', 'asked'); social hierarchy and speaker identity conveyed through honorific language, formal register shifts, and kinship terms within the speech itself; formal oratorical patterns for backstory exposition
description_strategy: Sparingly deployed; atmospheric effect achieved through dialogue context and formal speech patterns rather than sensory or environmental detail; characters described through what they say and how they speak rather than physical or behavioral observation
exposition_strategy: Backstory delivered through formal introduction speech when new characters meet; exposition arrives embedded in dialogue rather than narrator statement; questions from newly introduced characters prompt explanation of situations; information reveals sequentially rather than in flashback
emotional_temperature: Formal elegance with moral undertone; tension maintained through external threat rather than interior conflict; emotional peaks arrive through virtue-vindication moments and family-reunion anticipation; crisis emotional register differs sharply from quotidian register
hooking_and_transitions: Chapter openings establish mood through poetic epigraph or transitional phrase; location shifts signaled through formulaic transitional markers ('按下不提', '不言'); hooks arrive through external intrusion (urgent messengers, pursuers, alarming summons) rather than character decision or internal revelation; cliffhangers interrupt ongoing action
adaptation_guidelines: Suitable for multi-thread narratives requiring sequential handling of geographically separated plot lines; effective for disguise-and-survival plots where virtue is central; recommend using honorific language and formal speech to distinguish characters without explicit attribution; maintain sharp register shifts between exposition and urgency
taboo_copy_signals: Chapter-opening classical verse in original language
Kinship terms or family name combinations
Historical proper nouns or dynasty references
Particular formal greeting or leave-taking phrases
